title: doronicum grandiflorum var. viscosum
intro: Doronicum grandiflorum var. viscosum, also known as the Sticky Leopard's Bane, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal medicine, valued for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin issues. The health benefits of Doronicum grandiflorum var. viscosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies.
